backend/main.mo: Defines an empty Motoko actor with no public methods, serving as a placeholder backend canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (sound manager, difficulty selector, AI Tic Tac Toe, Snake difficulty, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Ultimate Gaming Arena' that mounts the React app via a root div and module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with eight routes mapping paths to page components: Home, SinglePlayer, TwoPlayer, SnakeGame, RockPaperScissors, MemoryCardMatch, TrafficCarGame, and SnakeAndLadder.
frontend/src/components/DifficultySelect: Reusable full-screen overlay component that displays Easy/Medium/Hard difficulty buttons with neon-themed styling and calls an onSelect callback with the chosen difficulty.
frontend/src/components/GameBoard.tsx: Renders a 3x3 Tic Tac Toe grid with clickable cells, winning cell highlights, a status banner, and a restart button using neon styling.
frontend/src/components/Scoreboard.tsx: Displays win scores for Player X and Player O side-by-side with active-player neon glow highlighting (blue for X, purple for O).
frontend/src/components/SoundToggle.tsx: Button component that toggles global mute/unmute state via useSoundManager, showing a Volume2 or VolumeX icon with neon or muted styling accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameLogic.ts: Custom hook encapsulating Tic Tac Toe game logic, managing board state, turn switching, win/draw detection, and providing makeMove, resetGame, and getAvailableCells utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed since all game state is managed client-side.
frontend/src/hooks/useScoreboard.ts: Custom hook that persists and manages X/O player scores in localStorage, exposing incrementScore and resetScores functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundManager.ts: Custom hook that generates and plays programmatic sound effects (click, win, game over, score, special) via the Web Audio API, with mute state persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Orbitron and Rajdhani fonts, configuring Tailwind with a dark neon-themed design system including CSS custom properties for neon colors, glows, and reusable component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component rendering a grid of seven game cards (Tic Tac Toe, Snake, Traffic Rush, etc.) with neon styling, navigation via TanStack Router, and sound effects on click.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Displays a leaderboard page that reads per-game high scores from localStorage and renders them in styled cards for six games (Tic Tac Toe, Snake, RPS, Memory, Traffic Car, Snake & Ladder).
frontend/src/pages/MemoryCardMatch.tsx: Implements a 4x4 emoji memory card matching game with flip/match logic, move counting, best-score persistence in localStorage, and sound effects.
frontend/src/pages/RockPaperScissors.tsx: Rock-Paper-Scissors game page with animated shake/reveal phases, score tracking, particle effects on win, and Web Audio API sounds alongside the shared sound manager.
frontend/src/pages/SinglePlayer.tsx: Single-player Tic Tac Toe page where the user plays as X against an AI opponent with selectable easy/medium/hard difficulty using minimax, with score tracking and sound effects.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeAndLadder.tsx: Two-player Snake and Ladder board game with a 100-cell grid, animated dice rolling, predefined snake/ladder positions, turn management, and win detection.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeGame.tsx: React Snake game page rendered on an HTML5 canvas with three speed-based difficulty modes (Easy/Medium/Hard), score tracking with localStorage high score, and sound effects via useSoundManager.
frontend/src/pages/TrafficCarGame.tsx: React traffic car dodging game rendered on an HTML5 canvas with difficulty-configurable enemy speed/spawn rates, particle effects on collision, a Web Audio engine sound, and localStorage high score tracking.
frontend/src/pages/TwoPlayer.tsx: Two-player local Tic Tac Toe page that uses shared game logic and scoreboard hooks, plays sounds on moves/wins/draws, and displays turn/result status with neon-themed UI.
frontend/src/utils/minimax.ts: Utility module implementing the Minimax algorithm for unbeatable Tic Tac Toe AI, plus a random move helper, exporting getBestMove and getRandomMove functions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with neon colors, Orbitron/Rajdhani fonts, neon box-shadow utilities, and oklch-based design tokens, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the current version, feature list, and architectural notes for the Ultimate Gaming Arena multi-game app, including sound, difficulty selector, and per-game difficulty upgrade features.
